caption: A person is seen from a first-person perspective interacting with sports card products on a black surface. The setting includes several stacks of sealed cardboard boxes and a white promotional banner that reads "Sports Cards & Collectibles" and "HERMOSA BEACH." On the surface, there is an orange and white logo that reads "SPYS CASEBREAKS." In the top right of the scene, a small inset video shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt, who is also appearing next to a logo that says "CASPYS CASEBREAKS." Throughout the sequence, the person's left hand enters the frame and reaches toward the product. In the final sequence of the action, the person's hand reaches over to the right and begins to pick up one of the smaller black boxes from a stack.
